steps.t: In the hours before dawn, the forces of Saruman press their advantage. Gléowine is on the first level, west of the Hornburg.
Day has dawned, and with it comes new hope for Rohan. Gléowine has hurried off to hear what has happened, but Thurketel is nearby and his face speaks …
Day has dawned, and with it comes new hope for Rohan. Thurketel is by the map table west of the Hornburg.
